projects.name: GrabGPT
projects.description: Chrome extension for batch-downloading AI-generated images from ChatGPT conversations.
projects.notes: v1.0 shipped. Firefox port worth exploring.

tasks.title: do more user testing for persistent data memory

projects.name: Delta Green Character Manager
projects.description: React app with KIA tracking, drag-and-drop reordering, and PDF import via the Claude API.
projects.notes: PDF import working. Next: character sharing and export to printable sheet.

projects.name: 3D Ocean Simulation
projects.description: Photorealistic ocean using Three.js and custom GLSL shaders. Deeply satisfying to stare at.
projects.notes: Wave physics solid. Needs foam and spray pass.

projects.name: GBC Emulator
projects.description: Game Boy Color emulator written in JavaScript. Because building one from scratch is a rite of passage.
projects.notes: CPU core done. Audio is the usual nightmare — left it there for now.

projects.name: Voxel Sandbox
projects.description: Minecraft-adjacent voxel world with custom chunk generation and distance LOD.
projects.notes: Chunk generation solid. Needs lighting pass and a basic inventory system.

projects.name: PromptVault
projects.description: Electron + Gemini app for organizing, tagging, and replaying saved AI prompts.
projects.notes: Core flow done. Add tagging, search, and prompt chaining.

projects.name: Dani Calder Autonomous Persona System
projects.description: Fully AI-generated social media persona — green-skinned former biochemist in Portland. Full technical architecture: LLM orchestration, voice consistency pipeline, image gen, social posting automation.
projects.notes: Phase 2a (life simulation) in design. Three-phase system spec'd. Steady-state cost ~$105/mo modeled.

projects.name: Story Engine
projects.description: Claude Code-style agentic architecture scaffold for long-form fiction writing and worldbuilding.

ideas.text: Browser extension that auto-summarizes any open tab using Claude API — one-click summary sidebar
Strong app data visualizer — chart PRs, volume trends, rest times over time from exported CSV
Dani Calder control dashboard — content queue viewer, persona state tracker, platform stats, cost monitor
